title: SuperORES
description: A mod that adds new ores, blocks, tools, and buildings. And everything is pretty easy to find and craft! (of course it will be updated)
body:
Would you like to add new resources to your game and ways to create new tools from them? That's what this mod is for!
This mod has its own table for crafting unique ores.
These ores can be used to create very powerful sets of tools and armor!
## What is in the modification?
## ORES (will be added)
Keranite Ore: Generatiom **overworld 0-64**

![;l](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acf3cedee866d6efa03ca450e6f42652cd8cd96f.png)

Minilite ore generate **overworld 0-64**

![ds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6a3d729da486916b5c649843a8ca2f0b792e773.png)







THIS IS THE VERY FIRST VERSION OF THE MOD, IT WILL BE UPDATED!!!
